items.text: USED TEXTBOOK SALE! March 15-17, 9 AM-4 PM, Student Union Room 204. Hundreds of titles: $5-$20 each. Bring cash or card. All proceeds support the Campus Book Fund. Stock varies daily—come early!

questions.stem: According to the flyer, what is the price range for textbooks?

options.A: The textbooks cost between $10 and $25 each
options.B: The textbooks cost between $3 and $15 each
options.C: The textbooks cost between $1 and $10 each
options.D: The textbooks cost between $5 and $20 each

questions.stem: What does the flyer suggest attendees do regarding the sale?

options.A: To arrive at any time during the sale hours
options.B: To bring only debit cards for payment
options.C: To check the stock online beforehand
options.D: To come early because stock changes daily

questions.explanation: The flyer says 'Stock varies daily—come early!'

items.text: Hi Sarah, Just a quick note to confirm your tutoring appointment this Friday, May 10, from 2:00-3:00 PM in Anderson Hall, Room 112. Please bring your textbook and any questions. See you then! —Dr. Park

questions.stem: According to the email, what should Sarah bring to the tutoring appointment?
questions.explanation: The email states 'Please bring your textbook and any questions.'

questions.stem: What is the purpose of the email?

options.A: To confirm a tutoring appointment time and location
options.B: To cancel a tutoring session due to a schedule conflict
options.C: To request that Sarah reschedule her appointment
options.D: To inform Sarah about a change in the tutoring room

questions.explanation: The email begins 'Just a quick note to confirm your tutoring appointment' and provides time and location.

items.text: Fire Alarm Testing Notice. Testing will occur in Morrison Residence Hall on Wednesday, April 12, from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM. All residents must remain in their rooms during the test. No evacuation is required. For questions, contact Facilities Office at ext. 4567.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what must residents do during the fire alarm test?

options.A: To remain in their rooms during the test
options.C: To assemble outside in the parking lot
options.D: To report to the Facilities Office

questions.explanation: The notice states 'All residents must remain in their rooms during the test.'

questions.stem: What time does the fire alarm testing begin on Wednesday?
questions.explanation: The notice says testing occurs 'from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM', so it begins at 10:00 AM.

items.text: Great news! The computer lab in the library is offering free printing until this Friday! Normally $0.10 per page, but now you can print up to 50 pages at no cost. Perfect for last-minute assignments! Bring your student ID.

questions.stem: According to the post, what is required to use the free printing?

options.B: To pay a $0.10 fee per page
options.C: To bring a student ID card
options.D: To register at the library desk

questions.explanation: The post says 'Bring your student ID.'

questions.stem: What is the maximum number of pages that can be printed for free?
questions.explanation: The post states 'you can print up to 50 pages at no cost.'
